ddls:
CREATE TABLE "analytes" (
  "analyte_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyte */,
  "analyte_name" TEXT /* Name of the analyte */,
  "concentration_range" TEXT /* Range of concentrations for the analyte */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the analyte concentration */,
  "detection_limit" REAL /* The lowest concentration of the analyte that can be reliably detected */,
  "quantification_limit" REAL /* The lowest concentration of the analyte that can be quantified with acceptable precision and accuracy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyte_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample */,
  "analyte_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the analyte tested in the sample */,
  "n" INTEGER /* Number of samples */,
  "percent_acceptance_range" TEXT /* Percentage of acceptance within a certain range */,
  "mean_recovery_percent" REAL /* Mean recovery percentage */,
  "range_of_recovery_percent" TEXT /* Range of recovery percentages */,
  "standard_deviation_recovery_percent" REAL /* Standard deviation of recovery percentages */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was collected */,
  "collector_name" TEXT /* Name of the person who collected the sample */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the sample was collected */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample (e.g., soil, water, air) */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client who requested the sample testing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_analyte_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyte_id") REFERENCES analytes ("analyte_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the result belongs to */,
  "concentration" TEXT /* Concentration of the analyte in the sample */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was performed */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment used for the test */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the test */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the test result (e.g., pending, completed, reviewed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_results_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_results_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_results_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the equipment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the equipment (e.g., in use, maintenance, calibration) */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the equipment was last calibrated */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the equipment */,
  "calibration_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the equipment should be calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., technician, supervisor, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the report is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final, submitted) */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client who requested the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_control" (
  "qc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control measure */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment the measure is for */,
  "procedure" TEXT /* Description of the quality control procedure */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the equipment was last calibrated */,
  "next_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the equipment is scheduled for the next calibration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the quality control measure (e.g., passed, failed, pending) */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the quality control */,
  "calibration_certificate" TEXT /* Reference to the calibration certificate (e.g., file path or URL) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the quality control measure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
